selected_important_turn.text: We're really going to need that extra firewood.  We'll need the heat source, but also for cooking.  It a big deal that I get the extra wood, I hope you will understand why I need it.
selected_important_turn.why_important: This turn marks a clear escalation where YOU shifts from earlier cooperative proposals to an insistence on keeping extra firewood. It pushes a zero-sum frame (claiming scarce firewood) right after the opponent made a self-oriented counteroffer, and so strongly shapes the rest of the interaction and the final allocation.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: The message is purely persuasive/self-justifying and doesn't propose tradeoffs or acknowledge the opponent's stated priority for water. That increases antagonism and reduces opportunities for integrative trade (e.g., linkages or compensated concessions). Changing this turn could prevent escalation, preserve rapport, and enable a higher-quality deal for both sides.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Shift from a demand-style justification to a trade-oriented move: acknowledge the opponent’s water priority, briefly explain your constraint, and immediately offer a concrete trade or compensating concession (e.g., accept them taking the extra water if you get X in return, or propose swapping an item you value less). Use questions to invite their input rather than declaring entitlement.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase — opening tradeoffs creates opportunities for Pareto-improving exchanges instead of fixed zero-sum claims
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase — trade-based framing lets both parties get what they value rather than one side pressuring the other
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase — reduces resistance and defensiveness, making agreement smoother
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: improve — less blaming/pressuring and more collaborative problem solving preserves trust

value2reason.Low: It would be nice to be warm at night when it gets cold.
value2reason.Medium: I need energy in order to not feel run down and weak.
value2reason.High: I need to drink fluid, or else I get tired and groggy.

value2reason.Low: Hydration is important, I will need extra water to keep safe during these hot summer months.
value2reason.Medium: We plan on having a nice fire and will need extra firewood to be able to do this.
value2reason.High: Hello.  I am going to be bringing my 2 boys and I will be requesting the 3 packages of food.

dialogue.text: hi there
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Hello.  How are you?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: not too bad, looking forward to a good camping trip 🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Yes!  This camping trip is going to be great!  I hope to make it very memorable.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: indeed.  anyways, I would like to divide the extra supplies equitably
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I think we can defintiely work together and come up with a great solution and both get what we need
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: do you have a particular item preference?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I do.  I have been looking everything over and feel this won't be to hard to come to an agreement
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Well my camp places a premium on water.  How would you feel about for me: 2 water, 1 food, 1 firewood?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I think we're on the right track.  I am bring my 2 kids with me and they eat everything in sight.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Would they be okay with 2 food?  Otherwise can give you an extra and I can take either an additional water or firewood 🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I have a great offer.  How about I take 2 food, 2 firewood and 1 water and you will get the extra water your camp needs!!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: We place a premium on the water.  That's the same amount of water, do you mean we take 3?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I do need some extra water.  So I will need to take 1, but our preference is food and we would need firewood to cook it on.  if you're OK with this, I will submit it.  Its a great deal I think and we'll both get what we need
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: my counter then is 2 water, 1 food, and 2 firewood for us and we are set 🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: We're really going to need that extra firewood.  We'll need the heat source, but also for cooking.  It a big deal that I get the extra wood, I hope you will understand why I need it.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I understand the importance of firewood for cooking and warmth. However, I need 2 water, 1 food, and 2 firewood to stay hydrated and energized. Let’s finalize this split so we can enjoy the trip together.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I understand your need for water, and I'm happy to take the extra water if you agree to let me have the extra firewood. Let's make it 2 water, 1 food, and 2 firewood for you, and 1 water, 2 food, 1 firewood for me. Does that work?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: That sounds fair. Let's go with 2 water, 1 food, and 2 firewood for me, and 1 water, 2 food, and 1 firewood for you. We're all set for the trip!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I'm happy with this split! Let's confirm: 2 water, 1 food, and 2 firewood for you, and 1 water, 2 food, and 1 firewood for me. We're all set for the trip!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2
